blocks.content: Gido was dumbfounded.

blocks.speaker: Gido
blocks.content: This is impossible...
He had never anticipated that the largest fixer on Galliant Island would fall to a woman's strike.
Rian shook his head as he watched Tess dusting off her hands.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Was there even a place for a man to squeeze in here?
Elzain swordsmanship is known for its precise attacks.
Trained to pierce vital points in any situation, she was a technician capable of nullifying the difference in strength or size in an instant.
Getting to the tip of the chin with minimal movement is impossible without murderous concentration.

blocks.speaker: Elzain
blocks.content: Consider yourself lucky. If Tess had drawn her sword, you'd be dead already.
Shirone stared blankly at the immobile fixer.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Was this the movement of a swordsman that paralleled a mage?
If Rian's physical strength was avant-garde, Tess's strike seemed like a perfect work of art.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Wow, that was really cool, Tess.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Hehe! Was it okay? Shirone really has an eye for this. Unlike someone standing right there.
Rian approached Gido, paying him little mind.
Gido was trembling with fear.
When Rian grabbed his neck and lifted him, he made a final struggle.

blocks.speaker: Gido
blocks.content: Ugh! Do you know where you are?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I know, that's why I came. Does it look like we're playing hide and seek? Where's Amy right now?

blocks.speaker: Gido
blocks.content: Damn it! Who's Amy? How would I know?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Should I stop your heart instead of killing you?

blocks.speaker: Gido
blocks.content: Damn it all! I really don't know! If you're so curious, find out yourselves!

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: This bastard!
Rian's eyes blazed with anger.
He was already anxious, and this was just adding insult to injury.
Didn't they have no time to search, hence their current actions?
Just as he was about to intensify the threats, Shirone approached.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rian, that's enough. What's the point in asking if he doesn't know?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Then what? Are we really going to go around every room?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, we ask about what he knows.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What he knows? Like what?
Gido flinched as he locked eyes with Shirone.
It was a different kind of anger from Rian's. A chill surged, freezing his bones.

blocks.speaker: Gido
blocks.content: Ask where Falcoa is.
Royal Tavern. Basement Level 1.
Those in the know called this place a temple.
Of course, no god resided here. But sometimes, one might see a god, due to the hallucinogenic effects induced by Lupe.
In the end, the 4th-floor VIP rooms were just for tourists who came based on rumors, but the real deal was all underground.
The temple was a space for those addicted to pleasure, where various drugs circulated, and the stimulant Lupe could be enjoyed without limit.
The temple was divided into 17 sections, and the total area was 1.5 times larger than the first floor.
It was always full, but Room 4 was never open to guests because it belonged to Falcoa, the team leader of the Freeman organization and the boss of the Royal Tavern.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: So I asked him. Do you want to be buried after you die, or die after you're buried? You know what he said?

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Ehehe, what did he say, boss? What did that guy say?
Falcoa screamed as if dying.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Please~ save me!

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Ahahaha! I'm dying of laughter! Please~ save me!
Falcoa's men burst into laughter, pounding on the table.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Crazy bastards. What's so funny about this? They're out of their minds.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Oh dear, why aren't you drinking?
Zis didn't even make eye contact with his partner, just shaking his head.
Drinking here felt like he'd never see tomorrow's sunrise.
Zis discreetly turned to look at Falcoa's partner.
Amy, whom he had brought along, was sitting there.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Of course, she didn't understand Falcoa's sense of humor either and just stared blankly ahead with an indifferent face.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Really impressive. I'm scared to death, but her expression doesn't change at all.
Normally, a woman, especially a young girl, would tremble with fear in such a threatening situation surrounded by violent gang members.
But there was not a hint of tension on Amy's face.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Ah, it's noisy. I'm bored. I want to go back.
Amy moistened her lips with the drink in front of her.
As a noble, she was taught about liquor, but she wasn't inclined to enjoy it and didn't usually drink.
At most, she sipped enough to cover the bottom of the bottle out of boredom.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But the alcohol still made her feel light-headed, leading her into a somewhat sentimental state.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What am I doing here?
Of course, she had come along out of pity for Zis.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But upon reflection, that didn't seem to be the only reason.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: He must have returned by now, right?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Why was Shirone late? Perhaps he was caught up in another needless commotion.
From Shirone's omniscient point of view, how many unfortunate people could there be in the world?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hehe, did I want to imitate that?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Thinking about it, her reason for coming here wasn't much different.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She had heard the screams of a ruffian at the harbor, begging for his life.
Of course, he didn't seem completely down and out.
The mood at the drinking party grew more heated.
The more it did, the more irritated Amy became.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She could easily show her power and leave if they were forceful, but contrary to expectations, Falcoa behaved with manners.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What are you thinking? Should I make the first move instead?
While Amy was lost in such thoughts, Falcoa was also aware of her, wearing a sinister smile.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: I can hear the wheels turning in her head from here.
Amy must be a high noble. There was an inherent nobility about her that couldn't be compensated for by mere appearance.
But Falcoa was at ease. He had the ultimate weapon to subdue nobility.
Indeed, with this, even a king would kneel before him.
That was Lupe.
Even now, many high nobles had become slaves to Lupe in the temple.
Timing it right, gradually training them with Lupe, even the proudest noble couldn't withstand it.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Come, come. Let's toast, to a toast!
BOOM
A crashing sound came from beyond the plank, followed by the shouts of the staff.

blocks.speaker: Staff
blocks.content: What the! Ugh!

blocks.speaker: Staff
blocks.content: Hey! Stop them! That's the boss's room!
The door burst open, and three people entered.
Zis stood up in shock upon recognizing the faces of the intruders.
They were Amy's friends from the harbor.
Falcoa's expression soured immediately.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: What's this? What's going on?

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: We came to take Amy. Let her go.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Pfft, sounds like a kidnapping. Even nobles need to be careful, especially in places like this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone? How did you find this place?
Amy asked, her eyes wide in surprise.
But Shirone postponed his answer.
An unbearable itching sensation was crawling up his spine.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The man sitting arrogantly at the high seat, legs crossed, must be Falcoa.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He didn't look like a monster, but it was clear at a glance he was not normal.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He's strong, that man...
It's easy to show a killing intent. If you truly intend to kill, even an ordinary person can intimidate others.
But it's not easy to subtly exude a faint killing intent as if it's barely there.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Only a professional killer could emit such an aura.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Amy...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why was Amy sitting next to such a person?
Instead of tea or coffee, which she preferred, there was a glass of alcohol in front of her.
The floor was dirty, the air was stale. Nothing she had in her room was here.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Therefore... she wasn't here of her own will.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go back, Amy.
Amy felt a surge of emotion.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: After all this time, the only thing he had to say was 'Let's go back, Amy.'?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: He was nowhere to be seen when she was waiting, and now he has this bold attitude?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy was angry at herself for being glad to see Shirone just moments ago.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: From what perspective was Shirone looking at her now? From the height of a human, or from the high heavens?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: This wasn't what she wanted. That's why she didn't want Shirone's help.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She could leave right now if she wanted to.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: You, you guys! Do you know where you are, barging in here!
All the tavern's staff rushed over.
But none dared to enter Falcoa's lair, as if it were the den of a fearsome demon.
Shirone was astounded.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A boss that even his underlings feared. How deep and dark was this man's evil?

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: What are you? Do you know what happens when you enter a room without my permission?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: We came to take Amy. Let her go.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Pfft, sounds like a kidnapping. Even nobles need to be careful, especially in places like this.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What are you waiting for? Send these kids back.

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: Where should we send them back to, boss?

blocks.speaker: Falcoa
blocks.content: To hell.
Falcoa's direct subordinates started to advance, loosening up their bodies.
They were on a different level compared to the staff they had passed by.
Tess drew her sword, readying herself, and said,

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Shirone, be careful. All of these guys are Schema users.
A light flashed in Shirone's eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Tess had a keen eye, so it must be true.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Of course, most students at the swordsmanship school could open their Schema.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But it was strange that not a single thug living on this island lacked the ability to use Schema.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Who is this person? How can a mere tavern owner command such skilled individuals?
Shirone stared straight at the underlings blocking the way.
At that moment, an overwhelming emotion struck Shirone's heart.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Shirone, be careful! It's Pressure!
There are many abilities related to the 'eye techniques' in the Schema perception, but Pressure was among the most common.
It was intuitive and useful in real combat because it was easy to master if one knew how to release their emotions outward.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone wasn't flustered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He realized it was the same technique used by Adel, the head butler of the Karmis family, the moment the opponent's hostility pressed down on him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But the quality of the emotion was different.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If Adel's Pressure was meant to overpower, theirs was solely to take life.
Rian gripped the hilt of his straight sword and took a step forward.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: How dare you!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Rian! Wait!
Falcoa's men looked at him in surprise.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was Pressing from 10 people at once; normally, it would have stopped one's heart, not just halted speech.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But Shirone still stood, a faint smile on his lips.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Indestructible. In a way, it's a power that rivals my Red Eye.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Pressure couldn't sway Shirone. Maybe it could, but not at their level.
Shirone began to walk slowly.
As if pushed by the atmosphere, the underlings stepped back with the same pace.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It wasn't easy for Shirone to emit emotions either.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was the pressure injected by 10 veterans who had experienced countless battles.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's impossible to put a value on emotions, but it felt like waiting for a carriage to run over you with your hands and feet tied to the ground.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: More precisely, it was the terror of the moment when the carriage arrived right in front of you, and the massive wheels filled your entire field of vision.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In reality, the fear would last only 0.1 seconds because death awaited, but Shirone was experiencing the same emotion for over 20 seconds.
